info.title: Telemetry API
info.summary: Single-user body-recomposition tracking: weight, measurements, and AI nutrition logging.
info.description:
HTTP API behind [Telemetry](https://telemetry.skeptrune.com), a body-recomposition tracker.

All routes are gated by Cloudflare Access: the verified identity arrives as the `Cf-Access-Authenticated-User-Email` request header and every record is scoped to that email, so one account can never read another's data. The scale-ingest route is the one exception — it is authenticated with a bearer token and attributes readings to a configured owner.

Nutrition is logged from a freeform text description, which is sent to Claude, which returns per-item calories and protein.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Browser-based CLI login against Cloudflare Access.

tags.name: Nutrition
tags.description: Per-day calorie and protein totals plus AI meal logging.

tags.name: Targets
tags.description: Per-user goals: target weight, calories, and protein.

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Pre-aggregated snapshot powering the home screen.

tags.name: Ingest
tags.description: Token-authenticated machine ingest from the Bluetooth scale listener.

get.description: Returns a static payload confirming the Worker is up. Unauthenticated; used for uptime checks.
Returns the Cloudflare Access-verified email backing this session.
Returns up to 365 of the caller's most recent weight readings, newest first.

post.description: Records a manual body-weight reading for the caller.

patch.description: Updates or clears the note on one of the caller's past readings.

requestBody.description: The new note value, or null to clear it.

get.description: Returns up to 500 of the caller's measurements, newest first.

post.description: Stores a body-part circumference measurement for the caller.

get.description: Returns up to 60 of the caller's most recent daily nutrition roll-ups, newest first.

put.description: Directly sets the calorie and protein totals for one calendar day, replacing any existing roll-up.

get.description: Returns the caller's targets, creating a default row on first access.

put.description: Partially updates the caller's targets; omitted fields are left unchanged.

requestBody.description: The fields to change; omitted fields are left unchanged.

get.description: Returns the weight summary, targets, latest measurements, shoulder-to-waist ratio, and the given day's nutrition in one response.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Day to report nutrition for (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to the server's current UTC date.

post.description: Machine endpoint for the Bluetooth scale listener. Authenticated with the ingest bearer token and attributed to a configured owner rather than the Access identity.

200.description: The scale reading was ingested and stored.

post.description: Uploads 1–5 photos of a single meal, sends them to Claude vision for per-item calorie and protein estimates, stores the photos plus a meal, and returns the analysis.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Day to log against (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to the server's current UTC date.

requestBody.description: The meal photos to analyze, as multipart form fields named `photos`.

photos.description: 1–5 photos of a single meal, possibly from multiple angles (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF; max 8MB each).

200.description: The meal was analyzed and logged.

post.summary: Log a meal from a description
post.description: Sends a freeform meal description to Claude for per-item calorie and protein estimates, respecting stated portions and excluding anything the user says they skipped, then stores it as a meal.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Day to log the described meal against (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to the server's current UTC date.

requestBody.description: The freeform meal description to analyze.

200.description: The meal description was analyzed and logged.

get.description: Returns the caller's logged meals for a day, each with its food items, newest first.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Day to list (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to the server's current UTC date.

200.description: Meals for the day, newest first.

delete.description: Removes one of the caller's meals, its food items, and any stored photos, then recomputes the day's totals.
Removes a single logged food item and recomputes the affected day's totals.

get.description: Streams a stored meal photo from object storage. The key is owner-prefixed, so callers can only read their own photos. Note that the key contains slashes.

404.description: No photo exists at that key.

get.description: The machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 description of this API, generated from in-code comments.
Behind Cloudflare Access; after SSO it redirects the verified Access token back to the CLI's local loopback callback. Not called directly by users.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: Loopback port the CLI's one-shot callback server is listening on.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Opaque nonce the CLI generated, echoed back so it can reject unsolicited callbacks.

302.description: Redirect to the CLI's loopback callback carrying the Access token.

cloudflareAccess.name: CF_Authorization
cloudflareAccess.description: Cloudflare Access session. Access verifies the user via SSO at the edge, sets the `CF_Authorization` cookie, and injects the trusted `Cf-Access-Authenticated-User-Email` header that the API uses as identity.

ingestToken.description: Shared secret carried as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`, used only by the scale-ingest route.

BadRequest.description: The request body or parameters failed validation.

Unauthorized.description: Missing or incorrect ingest bearer token.

Forbidden.description: The requested resource belongs to another user.

NotFound.description: No matching resource owned by the caller.

ServiceUnavailable.description: A required secret (model key or ingest token) is not configured.

Error.description: Standard error envelope returned by every non-2xx response.

detail.description: Optional extra context, present on upstream failures.

Ok.description: Minimal success acknowledgement for write operations.

ok.description: Always true when the Worker is responding.

ts.description: Server time when the probe was answered.

WhoAmI.description: The Cloudflare Access identity resolved for this request.

email.description: Verified account email, or `dev@local` in local development.

ts.description: Weigh-in time as a Unix epoch in milliseconds.

bodyFatPct.description: Body-fat percentage, if recorded (noisy on consumer scales).

note.description: Free-text note attached to the reading.

source.description: Where the reading came from, e.g. `manual` or `scale`.

NewWeight.description: Body for logging a manual weigh-in.

weightKg.description: Body weight to log, in kilograms.

bodyFatPct.description: Optional body-fat percentage for the weigh-in.

WeightNote.description: Body for editing the note on an existing weigh-in.

note.description: New note text, or null to clear it.

ts.description: Measurement time as a Unix epoch in milliseconds.

site.description: Body site identifier for the new measurement.

NutritionDay.description: Rolled-up calorie and protein totals for one calendar day.

proteinG.description: Total protein in grams logged that day.

hitProtein.description: Whether the day's protein target was met.

adherence.description: Calorie adherence bucket for the day.

NutritionDayInput.description: Body for upserting a day's totals directly.

kcal.description: Total calories to set for the day.

proteinG.description: Total protein in grams to set for the day.

hitProtein.description: Whether to mark the protein target as met.

Targets.description: A user's goals. Created with defaults on first read.

targetDate.description: Goal date as a Unix epoch in milliseconds.

startDate.description: Plan start date as a Unix epoch in milliseconds.

TargetsInput.description: Partial update to a user's targets; omitted fields are left unchanged.

goalWeightKg.description: New target body weight in kilograms.

startWeightKg.description: New starting body weight in kilograms.

proteinTargetG.description: New daily protein target in grams.

targetDate.description: New goal date as a Unix epoch in milliseconds.

TrendPoint.description: One point on the weight trend line.

ts.description: Trend-point time as a Unix epoch in milliseconds.

WeightSummary.description: Latest-weight summary block of the dashboard.

weeklyAvgKg.description: Mean weight over the last seven days.

bodyFatPct.description: Body-fat percentage from the latest reading.

MeasurementLatest.description: Most recent value for one measurement site.

site.description: Body site of this latest measurement.

ts.description: Time of the latest measurement as a Unix epoch in milliseconds.

DashboardData.description: Everything the home screen needs in a single response.

weight.description: Latest-weight summary for the dashboard card.

targets.description: The user's current goals shown on the dashboard.

nutritionToday.description: Today's nutrition totals, or null if nothing is logged.

IngestWeight.description: Body for a machine-submitted scale reading.

userEmail.description: Owner to attribute the reading to; falls back to the configured ingest user.

raw.description: Opaque raw payload from the scale, stored for debugging.

AnalyzedItem.description: One food item estimated by the model.

MealAnalysis.description: Result of logging a meal from photos or a text description.

totalProteinG.description: Summed protein in grams across items.

note.example: assumed a single chicken breast and one tablespoon of toum

photoKeys.description: R2 object keys of stored photos (empty for text descriptions).

DescribeMeal.description: Body for logging a meal from a freeform text description.

text.description: What you ate, in your own words. State anything you skipped so it is excluded.
text.example: two scrambled eggs, a slice of sourdough, and black coffee

LoggedItem.description: A persisted food item within a meal.

Meal.description: A logged meal with its food items.

note.description: Meal note or the original text description.

createdAt.description: Meal creation time as a Unix epoch in milliseconds.

photoKeys.description: R2 object keys of the meal's photos.
